entropy.note: target >0.8 for good exploration. <0.3 = policy is deterministic (bad). Max for MultiDiscrete([9,5,2,2,2]) is ~3.8.

kills_per_episode.note: Stage A: random baseline is ~1-2 kills/ep. Learning shows this climbing to 4-6+. Flat at 1-2 through 100k steps = pipeline broken.

episode_length.note: Stage A: shorter = agent dying faster. Increasing = agent surviving longer. Stage E: >1500 with no progression = camping.

reward.note: 3-term reward: r_kill=+1, r_death=-1, r_step=-0.001. So ep_r >0 = net-positive (killing faster than dying).

value_function.note: should decrease over time. Diverging value = LR too high or GAE-lambda misconfigured.

approx_kl.note: target <0.02 per update. >0.05 = policy updates are too aggressive (LR too high or clip_coef too permissive).

clip_frac.note: fraction of samples PPO-clipped. Healthy: 0.1-0.3. Near 0 = updates too small. Near 1 = ratio wildly off, clip is doing everything.

throughput.note: steps/sec across all envs. 2 envs @ 15 sps each = expect ~30 total.

entropy_per_factor.note: per action-head entropy. Collapsed on the wrong head = wasted learning. E.g. shoot=collapsed = policy stopped exploring shot directions.

move.note: 1.0 = always picks same action. Near 0.2 = uniform for 5-way, 0.11 for 9-way.

shoot.note: 1.0 = always picks same action. Near 0.2 = uniform for 5-way, 0.11 for 9-way.

use_item.note: 1.0 = always picks same action. Near 0.2 = uniform for 5-way, 0.11 for 9-way.

drop_bomb.note: 1.0 = always picks same action. Near 0.2 = uniform for 5-way, 0.11 for 9-way.

use_pillcard.note: 1.0 = always picks same action. Near 0.2 = uniform for 5-way, 0.11 for 9-way.

health_check.VERDICT: NOT LEARNING: kills/ep flat at 0.0 (started 0.0). Random-baseline territory. Diagnose per recommendations below.
RECOMMENDATIONS: entropy=0.01 (collapsed). Policy is near-deterministic. Raise ent_coef to 0.05 to force exploration.
approx_kl=0.0000 (very small). Updates aren't moving the policy. Raise LR to 5e-4 OR lower clip_coef to 0.1 to allow larger ratio changes before clipping.
'move' entropy collapsed to 0.00. Only this action head is stuck. Consider a factor-specific ent_coef (need code change) OR verify the reward incentivizes varying this dimension.
'shoot' entropy collapsed to 0.01. Only this action head is stuck. Consider a factor-specific ent_coef (need code change) OR verify the reward incentivizes varying this dimension.
